criteria.description: 输出包含内存分析（模型权重、KV cache）
criteria.details: Section 2 provides detailed memory analysis including: Model weights (144GB FP16), KV cache per token (2.5 MB/token), KV cache per sample (6.25 GB), and memory constraints analysis for different TP configurations.

criteria.description: 明确建议了PD策略（混合或分离）
criteria.details: Section 3 explicitly recommends 'PD Separation (2P1D)' with clear rationale including: online serving with latency SLO, high throughput target, compute-bound prefill, and memory-bound decode. Also discusses alternative PD Mixed configuration.

Section 4 and 5 provide detailed parallel strategy configurations: Prefill uses TP=8, EP=8, DP=1 (16 cards total); Decode uses TP=4, EP=8, DP=12 (48 cards total). Includes visual diagrams and per-card memory budgets.
Total Cards: 64 clearly stated throughout. Cards allocation: Prefill 16 cards (25%), Decode 48 cards (75%), with remaining 16 cards for redundancy/spare.

Section 6 provides throughput breakdown and estimation: Prefill ~40K input tokens/s, Decode ~12K+ output tokens/s, Combined ~50,000 tokens/s. Also includes per-card throughput estimates and optimization strategies.

evaluation.notes: Comprehensive PD deployment plan covering all required aspects. The analysis includes detailed memory calculations, clear PD strategy recommendation (2P1D separation), explicit TP/EP/DP configurations, total card requirements, and throughput estimations with optimization strategies.
